nasb.text: The sons of Judah were Er, Onan and Shelah; these three were born to him by Bath-shua the Canaanitess. And Er, Judah’s firstborn, was wicked in the sight of the Lord, so He put him to death.

esv.text: The sons of Judah: Er, Onan and Shelah; these three Bath-shua the Canaanite bore to him. Now Er, Judah’s firstborn, was evil in the sight of the Lord, and he put him to death.

cnv.text: 猶大的兒子是珥、俄南和示拉。這三人是迦南人書亞的女兒所生的。猶大的長子珥行耶和華看為惡的事，耶和華就使他死去。

ccb.text: 犹大的儿子是珥、俄南和示拉。这三人是迦南人书亚的女儿生的。犹大的长子珥在耶和华眼中是个邪恶的人，因而被耶和华击杀了。
